title: CF Network Official Pack
description: The Official Modpack for the Carbon Fiber Server Network
body:
The Official Modpack for the Carbon Fiber Server Network
========================================================

Features
--------

This modpack contains all of the essential mods to play on the Carbon Fiber Server Network, and also uses some client-side mods to enhance the user experience. These features include but are not limited to:

*   Custom home and loading screens
*   Custom menu music
*   Custom title bar
*   Dedicated button to play on Carbon Fiber
*   Built-in resource pack that loads on playtime for special tab-menu image display (Carbon Fiber specific feature)

The UX:
-------

The most features added outside of function mods, are to enhance the player experience. Most are aesthetic changes, and some are performance mods to try and make sure anyone can play with this pack, though, loading times are still quite hefty. These changes are aimed to create a smooth and unique user experience while playing on Carbon Fiber.


![](https://i.imgur.com/4rlXOPi.png)
